state.next-action: Evolution turn through checkpoint 31 shipped 2026-04-15. Parallel-work session completing as context fills. Shipped: 42.2-29 (snapshot --mode=active + decision gad-195; rehydration experiment CANCELLED by operator confirmation), 42.2-30 (gad skill find + evolve narrative fix + CLAUDE.md update), 42.2-31 (discovery battery RERUN — mean 7.3 → 7.9). Commits: c44cf86, ffd3aed, 3f2b3bd. Rerun results: Agent A 5→6, B 8→8, C 7→7, D 8→9.5, E 8→9. Target 8.5 still 0.6 away — remaining gaps are well-understood (Agent C needs gad skill find rerun which ships AFTER this battery, EQUIPPED SKILLS top-5 still misses task-relevant skills, Agent A didn't follow transitive refs). All P0 gaps closed. 3 of 4 P1 gaps closed. Agent E incident: actually executed candidate→canonical pipeline and promoted a skill; operator reverted; workflows/discovery-test.md now forbids write-side CLI verbs. Open for next session: (a) third battery rerun after 42.2-30 to measure gad skill find impact on Agent C, (b) snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS pinned-skills refactor, (c) more Position B workflow retrofits (gad-plan-phase, gad-debug), (d) unblock 42.2-13 via 42.2-06, (e) phase 44.5 Project Editor work. Session ending — all committed work is durable in .planning/ + commits.
